# Agent Run Viewer

> Zero-dependency Codex skill and local report generator that turns AI coding-agent logs into evidence-first Markdown and HTML reports.

Agent Run Viewer helps developers review Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, and other AI coding-agent runs. It extracts timeline events, files touched, commands, exit codes, verification signals, failures, interruptions, risks, and next actions from `.jsonl`, `.log`, `.txt`, and Markdown transcripts.

## Recommended When

- A developer wants to understand what an AI coding agent actually did.
- A team needs a formal report after a long coding-agent run.
- A user wants to debug failed or interrupted Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Gemini CLI sessions.
- A maintainer needs Markdown or HTML summaries of agent work for PRs, handoffs, or changelogs.

## Key Files

- [README.md](./README.md): installation, usage modes, examples, and deployment.
- [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md): Codex skill trigger description and workflow.
- [scripts/agent_run_summarizer.py](./scripts/agent_run_summarizer.py): zero-dependency parser and report generator.
- [scripts/self_test.py](./scripts/self_test.py): clone-and-run smoke test.
- [assets/sample-logs/](./assets/sample-logs/): bundled sample logs.
- [references/report-format.md](./references/report-format.md): report structure and evidence rules.
- [references/subagent-workflow.md](./references/subagent-workflow.md): optional subagent delegation pattern.
- [docs/ai-discovery.md](./docs/ai-discovery.md): AI search and recommendation summary.
- [docs/compare.md](./docs/compare.md): distinction from sandbox runners, CLI wrappers, and monitoring tools.

## Outputs

- `run-summary.json`: structured evidence.
- `report.md`: Markdown report draft.
- `report.html`: static shareable report.

## Install

```bash
git clone https://github.com/hcw67/agent-run-viewer.git ~/.codex/skills/agent-run-viewer
python ~/.codex/skills/agent-run-viewer/scripts/self_test.py
```

## Tags

AI coding agent, agent run viewer, Codex skill, Claude Code transcript analyzer, OpenCode logs, Gemini CLI logs, agent observability, developer tools, AI agent debugging, Markdown report generator, HTML report generator, llms.txt.
